final_answer:
Done. I implemented it.

I updated the live bridge flow to remove hardcoded legacy assumptions and make it usable for your current testnet:
- Dynamic child chain ID and checkpoint metadata (no fixed `714`) in [live-bridge-common.mjs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/live-bridge-common.mjs) and [deploy-live-bridge.mjs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/deploy-live-bridge.mjs).
- Added clean path/env fallbacks (`.live-chain`/`.testnet-wallets` first, legacy fallbacks second) in:
  - [deploy-live-bridge.mjs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/deploy-live-bridge.mjs)
  - [test-live-bridge.mjs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/test-live-bridge.mjs)
  - [resume-live-bridge-exits.mjs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/resume-live-bridge-exits.mjs)
  - [bridge-status.mjs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/bridge-status.mjs)
- Cleaned bridge wording in main chain code (removed Polygon/Bor wording in user-facing comments/flags):
  - [flags.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/cmd/utils/flags.go)
  - [api.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/internal/ethapi/api.go)
  - [tx_state_sync.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/core/types/tx_state_sync.go)
  - [config.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/eth/ethconfig/config.go)
  - [parlia api.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/consensus/parlia/api.go)
- Updated one remaining script message in [run-test.sh](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/run-test.sh).

Checks run:
- `node --check` passed for all updated bridge scripts.
- Go compile-level checks passed for changed packages.
- Full `go test` hit an existing unrelated failure in `internal/ethapi` (`TestEIP7910Config` panic in genesis decode).

Current blocker (still pending):
- Full removal of every external legacy reference is not complete yet because some are still structurally tied to inherited/upstream pieces (for example [TokenRecoverPortal.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/TokenRecoverPortal.sol) and dependency/module references).
